description: An internal auditor needs to plan the annual audit of a key distribution warehouse.

nodes.task_description: Review the prior year's audit workpapers to understand previous findings and risks.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor identifies recurring issues like inventory count discrepancies.

nodes.task_description: Draft an audit planning memo outlining the scope (including specific locations to be cycle counted), objectives, and required resources.

expected_outcome.value: A formal planning memo is created.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a kick-off meeting with the warehouse management to discuss the audit timeline and logistics.

expected_outcome.value: A meeting is scheduled and confirmed with the auditee.
